allow: Bash(python -c "from hipe.data import load_jsonl; insts=load_jsonl\('data/dataset_reference.jsonl'\); print\(len\(insts\), 'total'\); print\(insts[0].sample_id\)")

Bash(xargs -I {} sh -c 'echo "=== {} ===" && python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\(\\"{}\\"\)\); print\(\\"config:\\", d.get\(\\"config\\"\)\); print\(\\"nwracc_threshold:\\", d.get\(\\"mcmc\\",{}\).get\(\\"nwracc_threshold\\"\)\); pr = d.get\(\\"targets\\",{}\).get\(\\"PROBABLE\\",{}\); print\(\\"PROBABLE n_subgroups:\\", pr.get\(\\"n_subgroups\\"\)\); sgs = pr.get\(\\"subgroups\\", []\); print\(\\"top NWRAcc:\\", sgs[0].get\(\\"nwracc\\"\) if sgs else None\)"')
